name: optimind-docs
description: One command, /polish, that rebuilds Word and PDF reports as fully branded Optimind documents. A five-role subagent orchestration (Intake, Auditor, Classifier, DS-Extender, Renderer-QA) handles ambiguous content, extends the design system when novel elements appear, and auto-retries on QA failure. Source text, numbers, dates, and values are preserved verbatim. Emits a branded .docx plus a classification sidecar and an HTML audit report for every run.

output_dir.title: Output directory
output_dir.description: Where polished .docx files and HTML audit reports are saved.

state_dir.title: State directory
state_dir.description: Where per-run state bundles are stored. Safe to delete after a run.
